title: Seasonal influenza vaccine uptake in children of school age: monthly data, 2025 to 2026
body: "Help us improve this resource by taking our user survey.  For data covering 2024 to 2025, see Seasonal influenza vaccine uptake in children of school age: monthly data, 2024 to 2025. All of the previous season’s monthly data and annual reports are also available.  Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). The OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to.  Provisional monthly seasonal influenza vaccine uptake data in children of school years reception to year 11.  Data is presented by NHS England region and local authority.  View the pre-release access list for these reports.  "
